## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Uses required template
- [ ] Has YAML frontmatter
- [ ] Defines What / Why / How / Operate / Failure / Security / Evaluate
- [ ] Links related modules
- [ ] No customer secrets or credentials
- [ ] Security/governance concerns included
- [ ] Human reviewer assigned
